info.name: Pick2Win API
info.description: Complete Postman collection for the Pick2Win Express.js API, covering all User and Admin routes. Base URL defaults to http://localhost:3000/api. Set the `token` variable after calling User > Auth > Login, and `admin_token` after calling Admin > Admin Auth > Admin Login.

item.name: Send Mobile OTP (profile — verify own mobile)
Verify Mobile OTP (profile — verify own mobile)

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Summer Offer",
  "heading": "Get 50% extra coins",
  "button": "Buy Now",
  "image_url": "https://cdn.pick2win.io/banners/summer-offer.png",
  "description": "Limited time coin bonus offer.",
  "link": "https://pick2win.io/offers/summer",
  "is_active": 1,
  "sort_order": 1
}

{
  "category": "bug_report",
  "importance": "high",
  "subject": "App crash on login",
  "description": "The app crashes when I try to log in with Google.",
  "email": "john.doe@example.com",
  "location": "Login Screen",
  "email_followup": true
}

{
  "question": "How was your UCT experience?",
  "hint": "Rate your experience",
  "question_type": "radio",
  "is_mandatory": 1,
  "sort_order": 1
}

request.description: Razorpay signs the raw request body. In production this is invoked by Razorpay's servers, not manually — express.raw() is used server-side so the signature can be HMAC-verified against the exact original bytes.
